name: Signal
description: Signal messaging integration plugin for ElizaOS agents

SIGNAL_CLI_PATH.label: Cli Path
SIGNAL_CLI_PATH.help: Path to signal-cli executable (alternative to HTTP API). Leave blank to resolve signal-cli from PATH and auto-install with Homebrew on macOS/Linux when available; on Windows or without Homebrew, install signal-cli manually and set this path.

SIGNAL_CLI_AUTO_INSTALL.label: Auto Install Cli
SIGNAL_CLI_AUTO_INSTALL.help: Set false to disable Homebrew auto-install for the default signal-cli binary on macOS/Linux.

SIGNAL_HTTP_URL.label: Http Url
SIGNAL_HTTP_URL.help: Signal CLI REST API URL (e.g., http://localhost:8080)

SIGNAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.label: Account Number
SIGNAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.help: Signal account phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)

SIGNAL_SHOULD_IGNORE_GROUP_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Group Messages
SIGNAL_SHOULD_IGNORE_GROUP_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will only respond to direct messages
